_comment: ADOPT: the approved source register (Loom 2.0-rc.8 BrainKit). Every claim in every BrainKit section must be grounded in a source listed here. A source is APPROVED institutional material (a policy, a standard, a signed decision) — not the agent's inference. brainkit-check fails a section whose approved source references do not resolve here. Reference the D6 data-risk register and solution-domain packs by pointer; do not copy their contents.

sources.title: ADOPT: approved source title
sources.kind: ADOPT: policy | standard | decision | brand | register-pointer
sources.reference: ADOPT: where the approved source lives (URL, doc id, or repo path)
sources.approved_by: ADOPT: registry-id of the human who approved this source as authoritative
